full_text:
Ge Xi 葛奚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ge Xi (葛奚)was born in Jurong county, Danyang commandery. Raved drunkenly for which an enraged Sun Hao poisoned him. Ge Xi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
